name: Neural Embedder Pro
description: Enterprise-grade embedding API supporting 50+ languages. Outputs 1536-dim vectors. Latency <50ms p99. Supports batch and streaming modes.

name: VectorStore Cloud
description: Managed vector database with automatic sharding. Supports HNSW and IVF-PQ indexes. 99.9% SLA. 100M vectors on entry tier.

name: RAG Evaluator Kit
description: Automated evaluation suite for RAG pipelines. Includes faithfulness, relevance, and context recall metrics out of the box.

name: Document Parser Plus
description: Handles PDF, Word, HTML, and scanned documents. Layout-aware extraction with table detection. Outputs clean markdown.

name: Reranker Turbo
description: Cross-encoder reranking model. 2× better precision than BM25. Adds <80ms latency. Supports custom domain fine-tuning.

name: Chunker Smart
description: Semantic chunker with boundary detection. Supports fixed-size, recursive, and topic-based strategies. Python-first.

name: Observability Hub
description: Full-stack RAG observability. Traces every query, retrieval, and generation. Latency breakdown, token cost, hallucination scoring.

name: Hybrid Search Engine
description: Combines dense and sparse retrieval with RRF fusion. Outperforms pure dense by 18% on BEIR benchmark.
